git_push.commit_message:
fix: show wallet list on mobile and fix modal positioning

Add hardcoded wallet standards (Phantom, Solflare, etc.) so the modal
shows available wallets with deep links instead of the empty onboarding
screen. Reset dialog UA styles to fix off-center ...
